project_version_id.description: Identifier of the specific workspace in the project in which the articles exist. This ID is used to ensure the workflow status update is applied to articles in a particular workspace.

lang_code.description: Language code of the articles whose workflow status is being updated (e.g., "en", "fr"). This ensures the workflow status update is applied to the article in the specified language.

user_id.description: User ID of the team account changing the workflow status. This team account will be recorded in the audit log.

category_ids.description: List of category IDs to be updated. Each ID in this array should refer to an existing article in the specified project version and language.

status_id.description: ID of the workflow status to apply to the listed articles. If omitted, no status change is applied. The value should match one of the predefined workflow statuses in the project.

due_date.description: Due date associated with the workflow status for completing the task or review. It should be in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss)

comment.description: Optional text comment added along with the workflow status update. Useful for provided high-level instructions, context, or decisions.

assignee_id.description: ID of the user assigned to this workflow status. Assigning someone to a workflow status ensures they are notified via email.

workflow_status_info.description: Object for workflow status metadata. This object defines the new workflow status and any associated information like due date, comment, or assignee.
